title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of supporting an ageing population, then decide which two would be most effective for society as a whole.
options: Encouraging family caregiving with financial support

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to ageing population and society. Discuss the following ways of supporting an ageing population, then decide which two would be most effective for society as a whole. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two would be most effective for society as a whole.
